description: Environment setup - install dependencies and verify baseline build passes
steps: Run `npm run build` to confirm the existing project compiles without errors
If build fails, fix any existing issues before proceeding
acceptance_criteria: `npm run build` (tsc -b && vite build) passes with zero errors
verification: Run `npm run build` and confirm exit code 0
findings: npm install succeeded (312 packages). Build (tsc -b && vite build) passes with zero errors. Node v22.22.3 via nvm required (npm not on PATH without sourcing nvm.sh). Use: export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm" && [ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && . "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" && nvm use 22. Chunk size warning for index.js (611KB) is non-blocking.
